ns0:entry.ns0:title: BookStackApp/BookStack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BookStackApp/BookStack
Language: php
A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Bubka/2FAuth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Bubka/2FAuth
Language: php
A Web app to manage your Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) accounts and generate their security codes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MISP/MISP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MISP/MISP
Language: php
MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrestaShop/PrestaShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Qloapps/QloApps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Qloapps/QloApps
Language: php
QloApps is a Free and Open-source hotel management and reservation system to take a hotel business online. QloApps offers a Property Management System (PMS), a Booking Engine, and an attractive Hotel Website. Elevate hotel operations with QloApps to streamline processes and provide an enhanced experience for both hoteliers and guests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aureuserp/aureuserp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aureuserp/aureuserp
Language: php
Free and Open Source ERP platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bagisto/bagisto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bagisto/bagisto
Language: php
Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship admin panels & apps fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krayin/laravel-crm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krayin/laravel-crm
Language: php
Free & Opensource Laravel CRM solution for SMEs and Enterprises for complete customer lifecycle management.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mautic/mautic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mautic/mautic

Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openemr/openemr

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface.
